heroHeadline: JNIM & IS-Sahel Surge as AES Juntas Expel Western Forces and Embrace Russia
heroSubtitle: Tracking over a decade of jihadist insurgency, three coups, Wagner Group presence, and the collapse of the Western-backed regional security architecture across Mali, Burkina Faso, and Niger.
footerNote: Data sourced from ACLED, RFI, Le Monde, Crisis Group, UN OHCHR, HRW, SIPRI, and Institute for Economics & Peace. All figures approximate unless stated.
